title: Korak 10

challengeFiles.name: main

tests.text: Your add method should have two parameters: self and media_item.
Your add method should append the item passed to it to the items attribute.

description: Klasa MediaCatalogue treba metod za dodavanje medijskih stavki u katalog. Kreiraj metod add koji prima stavku media_item i dodaje je na listu items.
